items.event_title: FIFA World Cup 2026 + Czech Republic vs Mexico
items.image_prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 social poster suitable for TikTok, Instagram Reels and Facebook. Use visible text: "World Football Night". Visible text language: English-only visible text. Tone: fan_hype (energetic, exciting, vivid, social-media friendly, symbolic fan atmosphere). Composition type fan_with_phone: a Czech fan with a smartphone in the foreground, energetic but symbolic stadium atmosphere, no team marks. Theme: FIFA World Cup 2026 + Czech Republic vs Mexico. Marketing angle: personal greeting before a big Czech World Cup match. Include a visible smartphone, subtle music notes, gentle sound waves, a personal greeting / gift feeling, clean composition and strong central subject. Restrictions: no official logos, no official badges, no copyrighted team badges, no real athlete faces, no real celebrity likenesses, no exact trademarked visual identity, no graphic or disturbing imagery, no sensationalism. For sports use energetic symbolic fan atmosphere only; for serious topics use respectful human visual language with no fearmongering.
